deployment.note: First deploy (dpl_7BDPJCCkQrPANf49ARK185sSiC7p) was made before the Preview-scoped cron secret existed; redeployed once (this id) so the secret is active. Same frozen HEAD both times, only the env var set changed.

flags_set_preview_scope.OPENSERP_CRON_SECRET: generated fresh for Preview only, distinct from the Production secret, never printed to chat, held only in a scratchpad temp file for this session

build_serverless.detail: Build Completed in /vercel/output, all serverless functions created, deployment READY

zero_writes_new_state_tables.detail: openserp_query_rotation_state / openserp_engine_budget_state do not exist yet in Production Supabase (PGRST205: 'Could not find the table public.openserp_query_rotation_state in the schema cache') -- the Production migration is explicitly out of scope for this authorization. No write to these tables is structurally possible, and none occurred (endpoint short-circuited at NOOP before reaching any DB call).

zero_writes_listing_tables.detail: property_listings count read via service-role, read-only: 558 rows -- matches the known pre-existing baseline, unchanged.

no_var_task_write_attempt.detail: Proven structurally: the realistic serverless gate (data/audits/openserp-serverless-state-realistic-gate.json) already demonstrated 0 filesystem write calls through the real orchestration path; the deployed code is identical (frozen HEAD).

no_new_policy_rpc_view.detail: Both new-table migrations enable RLS with zero CREATE POLICY statements (service_role reaches rows only via BYPASSRLS, not a policy). No RPC or view created anywhere in this mission's commits.

no_market_index_table_browser_accessible.detail: Confirmed in Gate B: anon-role SELECT on both new tables returns 0 rows with no error (RLS silently empty), anon INSERT rejected outright. The browser only ever holds an anon-equivalent key.

no_false_zero_price.detail: Sampled 50 listings from /api/search?city=Casablanca&limit=50 -- 0 rows with price_mad/price === 0

no_console_hydration_page_network_error.detail: Checked / and /search in a real browser (Chrome, fresh load each time): 0 console errors/exceptions on either page. Network requests for both pages: all first-party asset/document requests 200. Observed 3 non-application 503 responses (.well-known/vercel/jwe, an OPTIONS / preflight, a HEAD /search) that are Vercel platform/deployment-protection-layer requests, not requests issued by the app's own code -- both pages rendered fully and functioned normally regardless.

client_bundle_no_secret.detail: Grepped .next/static for the literal Preview cron secret value, the string SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, and OPENSERP_CRON_SECRET -- 0 matches for all three.
